Landing.manifestQuote: Movement is the simplest gift we can give each other. We built it for every body, every age — and nobody pays a thing.
Landing.value1Body: English, Polish, Italian and Ukrainian — built with refugees from Ukraine in mind from day one. WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility: large type, generous touch targets, full screen-reader support.
Landing.value2Title: A new plan every day. Made for you.
Landing.value2Body: Claude AI puts together 3–5 exercises with your age, fitness, equipment and the weather outside in mind. Ten categories — including green sports and pair workouts (think grandparent + grandchild).
Landing.value3Title: Off the screen, into real life.
Landing.value3Body: Move & Improve Days and the Intergenerational Sports Olympics — across Poland and Italy. The app goes with the trainers, runs group sessions and remembers every participant.
Landing.lede: A free AI training companion designed for everyone — kids, parents, seniors, refugees, people with disabilities. Adapts to your fitness, equipment, weather and goals.
Landing.trustLine: Built for 260+ participants · Move & Improve Days · Sports Olympics
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to move — every day
Landing.featuresLede: Built around what actually works for real people: smart recommendations, motivation that lasts, and a community that moves together.
Landing.feature1Body: Daily training tailored to your age, fitness, equipment and the weather outside. No two days the same.
Landing.feature2Body: Built for kids, adults, seniors and refugees — with accessible UI, four languages, and clear instructions.
Landing.feature3Body: Streaks, badges, and the #SmartMoveChallenge feed turn solo workouts into a shared movement.
Landing.diff1Body: Pouring rain? Get an indoor plan. Sunny? Plogging or Nordic walking outdoors.
Landing.diff2Body: English, Polish, Italian and Ukrainian — refugees included from day one.
Landing.diff3Body: Tai-chi, Nordic walking, plogging, ultimate frisbee — sport for the planet, not against it.
Landing.diff4Body: WCAG 2.1 AA accessible. Senior-friendly fonts and touch targets. No paywall, ever.
Landing.howItWorksTitle: Three steps to your first plan
Landing.step1Body: Email and password. No credit card. Free forever.
Landing.step2Body: Age, fitness level, equipment you have, your city for weather. Five quick questions.
Landing.step3Body: Claude AI builds 3-5 exercises tailored to you, your weather, and your goals. Mark them done, build streaks, earn badges.
Landing.ctaSectionBody: Sign up in 30 seconds. Tell us about yourself. Get your first AI plan today.
Landing.freeForever: Free forever — no card, no hidden costs
Landing.faqLede: Everything you might want to know before starting.
Landing.faq1Answer: Yes. The app is co-funded by the European Union under Erasmus+ Sport. There's no payment, no subscription, no hidden costs. We're committed to keeping it free for at least 24 months after the project ends.
Landing.faq2Answer: Anyone aged 6 to 120 who wants to move more — kids, parents, seniors, refugees, people with disabilities. The app adapts to your fitness level and equipment, so you can start exactly where you are.
Landing.faq3Answer: No. Many exercises are body-weight only. If you have a yoga mat, resistance bands, dumbbells, a bike, or just a park nearby, the app will use that too. You tell us in onboarding.
Landing.faq4Answer: We use Claude — Anthropic's most advanced model — to generate a fresh plan every day based on your profile, the local weather, your equipment, and your goals. Plans never repeat exactly the same.
Landing.faq5Answer: Yes. The app runs on EU servers (Vercel + Supabase), data is hosted in the EU, and we follow GDPR. You can export your data and delete your account anytime.
Landing.faq6Question: Can I use it during the Move & Improve Days events?
Landing.faq6Answer: Absolutely — that's a core part of the project. Sign up, do the onboarding, and bring the app to the events. Trainers will use it to lead group sessions and track progress.

Mockup.greeting: Rain outside — we're staying in. Easy on the knees, strong through the core. Let's go.

Footer.cofundedBody: FitGenerations Smart TrAIner is co-funded by the Erasmus+ Programme of the European Union, under the Sport — Small-scale Cooperation Partnerships strand (project 101245857).
Footer.disclaimer: Funded by the European Union. Onboarding.title: Tell us about you
Onboarding.subtitle: We'll use this to build a plan that fits your day.
Onboarding.fitnessQuestion: How would you describe your fitness?
Onboarding.equipmentQuestion: What do you have at hand?
Onboarding.goalQuestion: What matters most to you right now?

Challenge.intro: Inspire others. Record a 15-30 second video of you moving — yoga, walk, dance, anything — and share the link with your community. Together we make movement go viral.
Challenge.submitted: Thanks for sharing! Your video will inspire others.
Challenge.feedEmpty: Be the first to share. Make it count.

History.title: Your activity
History.empty: No activity yet — start with today's plan.

Badges.title: Your badges
Badges.emptyEarned: No badges yet — log your first workout to earn one.

Events.title: Move with us. In person.
Events.intro: Four events across Poland and Italy — open to every generation, every fitness level, every age. Come find us.
Events.midDescription: A full day of sport across generations: warm-ups, functional training, team games, balance stations. Plus health workshops on recovery, nutrition and injury prevention.
Events.olympicsDescription: Ten competitions: 3x3 football, beach volleyball, one-basket basketball, pétanque, target throwing, an intergenerational obstacle course, a relay, ultimate frisbee, speedminton and giant outdoor chess. Awards ceremony to close.
Events.joinBody: Sign up in the app and hold your spot. Free, in four languages, accessible. No card.

Errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
